candidate_grammar.boundary: All finite order structures generated from canonical carriers, held pair-cell relations, exhaustive relation closure, complete bound selections and unique extremal witnesses.
candidate_grammar.generator: Generate the complete product of carrier identity, relation provenance, partial-order laws, comparability, bound generation, meet uniqueness, join uniqueness, monotonicity and extra-order status.

excluded_inputs: no lattice completeness without generated meets and joins
intended_certificate: Independent regeneration of the complete 512-candidate product, its sole all-preserving survivor, closure properties and controls.
statement: An admitted finite order is a held carrier relation whose reflexive, antisymmetric and transitive cells are exhaustively witnessed. Totality is admitted only when every generated pair is comparable. Lower and upper bounds are complete relation selections; meet and join exist only as unique greatest-lower and least-upper witnesses, and monotone maps preserve every retained comparison.
title: Exact finite order and conditional lattice structure
